name: Gimlet
description: Gimlet — GitOps-based Kubernetes deployment tool with environment management and Helm chart abstraction.

seo.title: Gimlet — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Gimlet: Gimlet — GitOps-based Kubernetes deployment tool with environment management and Helm chart abstraction.

when_to_use: GitOps Kubernetes deployment with Helm chart abstractions
Environment management across dev, staging, and production
Simplified K8s deployments for developer-owned shipping
Reducing Helm and kubectl complexity for app teams
Preview environments on Kubernetes via GitOps workflows

review.verdict: An approachable GitOps tool for small platform teams, not yet a replacement for heavyweights.
review.best_for: Small teams wanting GitOps on k8s without wiring Argo themselves
review.not_for: Large orgs already standardized on Argo CD or Flux

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
